name: netflix-gmail
description: Read Netflix emails from Gmail using HTTP Request nodes only (no Gmail node). Mark older Netflix emails as read, then extract today's unread verification codes plus message metadata.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{'from:(netflix.com OR mail.netflix.com OR account.netflix.com OR info@account.netflix.com OR no-reply@mailer.netflix.com) (verification OR security OR sign-in OR login OR code OR password) after:' + $now.setZone('Asia/Jakarta').startOf('day').toFormat('yyyy/MM/dd') + ' before:' + $now.setZone('Asia/Jakarta').plus({ days: 1 }).startOf('day').toFormat('yyyy/MM/dd') + ' is:unread in:anywhere -in:spam -in:trash'}}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{'from:(netflix.com OR mail.netflix.com OR account.netflix.com OR info@account.netflix.com OR no-reply@mailer.netflix.com) before:' + $now.setZone('Asia/Jakarta').startOf('day').toFormat('yyyy/MM/dd') + ' in:anywhere -in:spam -in:trash'}}

nodes.name: Batch Mark Old Netflix as Read

main.node: Batch Mark Old Netflix as Read
